title: Stable Growth: When valuing a stable growth firm, what must the growth...
summary: Assess that a stable growth firm's growth rate must not exceed the economy's growth rate.
prompt: When valuing a stable growth firm, what must the growth rate be relative to the overall economy?

options.text: When valuing a stable growth firm, the growth rate used in the DCF model must

solution: When valuing a stable growth firm, the growth rate used in the DCF model must be less than the growth rate of the economy to ensure sustainability. This condition prevents unrealistic expectations about a firm's ability to maintain growth indefinitely, as outlined in the materials on pages 48 and 49.
